title: PipiModForge
description: Adds the Pipi mod to forge. Textures were taken from lucifixion's pipi mod.
body:
Pipi mod based off of the twitter post by https://twitter.com/fake_orchestra/status/1629872179490766850

I took the textures from the fabric mod https://modrinth.com/mod/pipimod

The mob currently has no animations, and is also lacking in features compared to lucifixion's wonderful creation. Might add animations and the dying feature that the other mod has, later.

To breed them you need to use human flesh, which is dropped by players.
